expectations.text: deps-registered: requests and slack-sdk in requirements.txt
methods-are-skeleton: every method body contains only 'pass'
expectations.evidence: notify(status: str, message: str | None = None) -> None: pass; send_message(text: str) -> dict: pass. No SDK imports in the class file.

expectations.text: no-logic-in-main: only argparse + single call into libs

__init__(token: str, channel: str, pipeline_name: str | None = None); notify() and send_message() typed
